text:
in file
/usr/ports/www/nginx/Makefile.extmod
LUA_GH_TUPLE=           openresty:lua-nginx-module:v0.10.21:lua
LUA_VARS=               DSO_EXTMODS+=lua

change to
LUA_GH_TUPLE=           openresty:lua-nginx-module:v0.10.22:lua

right?
